---
title: "Workforce"
editor: visual
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
---

```{r}
#| label: Educational Attainment
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(dplyr)
library(plotly)
library(tidyr)

legend_annotations <- list(
  list(x = 1.02, y = 1.00, xref = "paper", yref = "paper",
       text = "<b>Educational Attainment</b>",
       showarrow = FALSE, xanchor = "left"),

  list(x = 1.02, y = 0.92, xref = "paper", yref = "paper",
       text = "■ Less than 9th grade",
       font = list(color = "#8c510a"),
       showarrow = FALSE, xanchor = "left"),

  list(x = 1.02, y = 0.84, xref = "paper", yref = "paper",
       text = "■ 9th to 12th grade, no diploma",
       font = list(color = "#d8b365"),
       showarrow = FALSE, xanchor = "left"),

  list(x = 1.02, y = 0.76, xref = "paper", yref = "paper",
       text = "■ High school graduate",
       font = list(color = "#f6e8c3"),
       showarrow = FALSE, xanchor = "left"),

  list(x = 1.02, y = 0.68, xref = "paper", yref = "paper",
       text = "■ Some college, no degree",
       font = list(color = "#c7eae5"),
       showarrow = FALSE, xanchor = "left"),

  list(x = 1.02, y = 0.60, xref = "paper", yref = "paper",
       text = "■ Associate's degree",
       font = list(color = "#5ab4ac"),
       showarrow = FALSE, xanchor = "left"),

  list(x = 1.02, y = 0.52, xref = "paper", yref = "paper",
       text = "■ Bachelor's degree",
       font = list(color = "#01665e"),
       showarrow = FALSE, xanchor = "left"),

  list(x = 1.02, y = 0.44, xref = "paper", yref = "paper",
       text = "■ Graduate or professional degree",
       font = list(color = "#003c30"),
       showarrow = FALSE, xanchor = "left")
)

S1501_wide <- readRDS("data/eduAttainment.rds")

edu_levels <- names(S1501_wide)[names(S1501_wide) != "NAME"]

S1501_long <- S1501_wide %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(edu_levels),
    names_to = "Education",
    values_to = "Percent"
  )

edu_colors <- c(
  "Less than 9th grade" = "#8c510a",
  "9th to 12th grade, no diploma" = "#d8b365",
  "High school graduate (includes equivalency)" = "#f6e8c3",
  "Some college, no degree" = "#c7eae5",
  "Associate's degree" = "#5ab4ac",
  "Bachelor's degree" = "#01665e",
  "Graduate or professional degree" = "#003c30"
)

all_counties <- unique(S1501_long$NAME)

init <- all_counties[1]

df_init <- S1501_long %>%
  filter(NAME == init)

# Create one trace per education level
p <- plot_ly()

for (county in all_counties) {

  df_county <- S1501_long %>%
    filter(NAME == county)

  for (edu in edu_levels) {

    value <- df_county %>%
      filter(Education == edu) %>%
      pull(Percent)

    p <- p %>%
        add_trace(
          x = county,
          y = value,
          type = "bar",
          name = edu,
          legendgroup = edu,
          marker = list(color = edu_colors[edu]),
          visible = (county == all_counties[1]),
          showlegend = (county == all_counties[1])
      )
  }
}

buttons <- lapply(seq_along(all_counties), function(i) {

  vis <- rep(FALSE, length(all_counties) * length(edu_levels))

  start <- (i - 1) * length(edu_levels) + 1
  end   <- start + length(edu_levels) - 1

  vis[start:end] <- TRUE

  list(
    method = "update",
    args = list(
      list(visible = vis),
      list(title = paste("Educational Attainment -", all_counties[i]))
    ),
    label = all_counties[i]
  )
})

p %>%
  layout(
  title = paste("Educational Attainment -", all_counties[1]),
  barmode = "stack",
  xaxis = list(title = ""),
  yaxis = list(
    title = "Percent",
    range = c(0, 100)
  ),
  legend = list(
    tracegroupgap = 0,
    title = list(text = "Educational Attainment"),
    x = 1.05,
    y = 1
  ),
  updatemenus = list(
    list(
      buttons = buttons,
      active = 0,
      x = 1.05,
      xanchor = "left",
      y = 1.2,
      yanchor = "top"
    )
  ),
  showlegend = FALSE,
  annotations = legend_annotations <- c(
  legend_annotations,
  list(
    list(
      x = 0,
      y = -0.15,
      xref = "paper",
      yref = "paper",
      text = "<b>Source:</b> U.S. Census Bureau, ACS 5-Year Estimates, Table S1501",
      showarrow = FALSE,
      xanchor = "left",
      font = list(size = 11, color = "gray")
    ),
    list(
      x = 0,
      y = -0.22,
      xref = "paper",
      yref = "paper",
      text = "Educational attainment for population age 25 and over.",
      showarrow = FALSE,
      xanchor = "left",
      font = list(size = 11, color = "gray")
    )
  )
),
    
  margin = list(r = 250, b = 100)
  ) %>%
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)

```

```{r}
#| label: Income by Sex and Edcational Attainment
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false



```
